form.title: 캠페인 제목
form.scheduled_at_help: 예약 시각을 설정하면 해당 시각에 캠페인이 자동으로 시작됩니다. 비워두면 초안으로 저장되거나 수동 발송됩니다.

messages.load_categories_failed: Failed to load friend link categories
messages.load_applications_failed: Failed to load friend link applications
messages.delete_link_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this friend link?
messages.delete_category_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
messages.review_or_disable_confirm: This link recently failed health checks. It is recommended to manually open the site and verify it first. If it should be removed from public display, you can disable it directly.

ai.title: AI 작업 및 통계
ai.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete selected AI task records? This action cannot be undone.

messages.quota_usage: {name} has reached {percent} of the {period} {scope} quota limit
messages.cost_usage: {name} has reached {percent} of the {period} {scope} cost limit
messages.failure_burst: {name} triggered {count} failed tasks within the last {window} minutes

posts.title: Post Management
posts.slug_hint: Custom URL path for the post
posts.tags_hint: Enter tag name and press Enter
posts.publish_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to publish this post? It will be visible to visitors immediately after publication.
posts.push_criteria_hint: System will automatically match subscribers based on categories and tags of this post.

push_options.none_desc: Publish the post only, no notification to subscribers.
push_options.draft_desc: Automatically create a marketing campaign draft for later editing and sending.
push_options.now_desc: Immediately send an email notification to relevant subscribers after publication.

posts.sync_to_memos_desc: Automatically create a summary memo in your Memos instance after publication.
posts.translation_group_hint: Link different language versions of the same post to enable switcher on front end
posts.save_current_first: Please save the current post first before creating a translation
posts.repush_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to push this article to subscribers again? This will generate a new email notification.

tts.manuscript_hint: You can fine-tune the script, or click AI Polish to generate a more engaging broadcast-style script.
tts.podcast_manuscript_notice: In dual podcast mode, the Doubao podcast model may rewrite the script during synthesis, so final audio may not exactly match the manuscript.

ai.voice_unsupported: Voice recognition is not supported in this browser. Please try Chrome or Edge.

cover_generator.title: AI Image Generator
cover_generator.prompt_placeholder: Describe the image you want to generate...
cover_generator.magic_hint: Auto-generate beautiful prompts based on article content
cover_generator.success: Cover generated and saved to media library
cover_generator.error: Failed to generate image, please try again

posts.content_too_short: Article content too short for analysis

wechatsync.extension_help: Please install and enable the WechatSync browser extension to use this feature.
wechatsync.no_accounts: No accounts found. Please make sure you are logged in to the extension.

posts.recover_draft_confirm: Unsaved local draft detected. Would you like to recover it?
posts.version_rollback_confirm: Are you sure you want to rollback to this version? Current editor content will be overwritten.
posts.version_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this version?

categories.title: 카테고리 관리
categories.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
categories.sync_to_all_languages: Sync creating versions for all languages

tags.title: 태그 관리
tags.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this tag?
tags.sync_to_all_languages: Sync creating versions for all languages

users.title: 사용자 관리
users.confirm_impersonate: Are you sure you want to impersonate "{name}"? This will open a new session.
users.confirm_revoke_all: Are you sure you want to force sign out this user from all devices?
users.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete user "{name}"? This action cannot be undone!

theme.title: Theme Customization
theme.custom_hint: In Custom mode, your manual color and style adjustments will be preserved and saved.
theme.color_reset_hint: Leave empty to use theme preset defaults
theme.mourning_mode_hint: Greyscale the whole site for special memorial days
theme.previewing_hint: Temporary preview mode active. Click cancel to revert.
theme.save_preset_hint: This will capture all current colors, border radius, and background settings.
theme.gallery_empty: Gallery is empty. Save your first custom preset!

commercial.global_toggle_desc: Enable or disable global monetization/sponsorship. When enabled, sponsor buttons will be displayed based on author or site-wide settings.
commercial.global_social_desc: Configure global default social links (used when author hasn't set their own).
commercial.global_donation_desc: Configure global default donation links (used when author hasn't set their own).

system.title: 시스템 설정
system.locked_by_env: 이 설정은 현재 환경 변수에 의해 강제되므로 수동으로 수정할 수 없습니다.

smart_mode.title: 스마트 하이브리드 모드 안내
smart_mode.description: 시스템 설정은 ENV, 데이터베이스, 기본값의 세 단계 우선순위로 결정됩니다. 상단에는 요약 통계만 유지하고, 각 필드는 현재 적용 중인 출처를 바로 옆에서 안내합니다.

messages.env_override: 현재 값은 환경 변수 {envKey}가 제어하므로 여기서 저장해도 즉시 반영되지 않습니다.
messages.forced_env_lock: 이 설정은 시작 시점에 읽히는 읽기 전용 항목이므로 환경 변수로 변경한 뒤 서비스를 재시작해야 합니다.
messages.default_used: 이 필드는 명시적으로 설정되지 않아 현재 기본값을 사용하고 있습니다.
messages.restart_required: 현재 값은 데이터베이스에 저장되었지만 완전히 적용되려면 서비스 재시작이 필요합니다.

demo_preview.title: 데모 미리보기 데이터
demo_preview.description: 이 페이지는 데모 모드에서도 시스템 설정 경험을 보여 줄 수 있도록 민감 정보를 제거한 샘플 데이터를 표시합니다. 읽기는 안전한 미리보기 데이터로 전환되며, 저장 및 삭제와 같은 수정 작업은 계속 차단됩니다.

audit_logs.title: 설정 변경 감사 로그
audit_logs.description: 관리자가 데이터베이스 기반 설정에 기록한 이력을 추적하고, 현재도 데이터베이스 값이 실제 적용 중인지 보여 줍니다.
audit_logs.empty: 아직 기록된 설정 변경 이력이 없습니다

notifications.title: 운영 알림 설정
notifications.description: 특정 사이트 이벤트가 발생했을 때 관리자가 어떤 방식으로 알림을 받을지 설정합니다. 적시에 도착한 운영 알림은 사용자 상호작용과 시스템 이상에 빠르게 대응하는 데 도움이 됩니다.

web_push.title: Web Push 기본 설정
web_push.description: 운영 브라우저 알림은 VAPID Subject, 공개 키, 그리고 서버 환경 변수에만 존재하는 개인 키에 의존합니다. 여기서는 공개 가능한 Subject와 공개 키를 관리하고, 개인 키가 런타임 환경에 준비되어 있는지 확인할 수 있습니다.
web_push.subject_hint: mailto:로 시작하는 연락 URI를 사용하는 것이 좋습니다. 예: mailto:admin{'@'}example.com
web_push.public_key_hint: 브라우저 구독에 사용할 VAPID 공개 키를 입력하세요.
web_push.private_key_hint: VAPID 개인 키는 WEB_PUSH_VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY 환경 변수를 통해서만 주입할 수 있습니다. pnpm web-push:generate-vapid 명령으로 전체 키 세트를 생성할 수 있습니다.

keys.friend_links_footer_enabled: Show Featured Friend Links in Footer
keys.live2d_data_saver_block: Disable Live2D on Data Saver / Slow Network
keys.canvas_nest_data_saver_block: Disable CanvasNest on Data Saver / Slow Network
keys.effects_data_saver_block: Disable Visual Effects on Data Saver / Slow Network
keys.ai_quota_description: Configure request, quota unit, cost, and heavy-task concurrency limits by global, role, and user layers.
keys.ai_image_description: Configure models for generating blog covers and illustrations
keys.ai_tts_description: Configure Cloud TTS services for blog content, podcasts, etc.

hints.site_name: Used as the fallback name for SEO, emails, and similar contexts when the site title is empty.
hints.ai_quota_policies_description: Use the basic editor for global and role rules first. Add user, trust_level, and type:* exceptions in the advanced JSON section when needed.
hints.ai_alert_thresholds_description: Configure quota usage, cost usage, and short-window failure burst alert thresholds with a form-based editor.
hints.ai_cost_factors_description: Use quota-unit price and exchange rates to unify AI cost display. The current rule uses the higher one between quota mapping and converted provider price.
hints.keywords_placeholder: One keyword per line. Matching comments will be marked as pending or spam.
hints.posts_per_page: Used as the default limit for post lists, archives, and similar paginated endpoints when no explicit limit is provided.
hints.upload_size_value: Supports unit-based values such as 4.5MiB or 100MB.
hints.audio_upload_size_value: Use a larger dedicated limit for audio files when needed. Unit-based values such as 100MiB or 256MB are supported.
hints.upload_daily_limit: Maximum number of uploads allowed globally within the rate-limit window.
hints.upload_single_user_daily_limit: Maximum number of uploads each user can make within the rate-limit window.
hints.upload_limit_window: Time window used for upload rate limiting, in seconds.
hints.email_daily_limit: Maximum number of emails the whole site can send within the rate-limit window.
hints.email_single_user_daily_limit: Maximum number of emails a single address can receive within the rate-limit window.
hints.email_limit_window: Time window used for email rate limiting, in seconds.
hints.footer_code: Injected at the end of the site footer. HTML snippets are supported.
hints.friend_links_application_guidelines: Shown at the top of the public friend link application page. Supports multi-line text for entry requirements and exchange rules.
hints.friend_links_footer_limit: Controls how many featured friend links can appear in the footer section.
hints.friend_links_check_interval_minutes: Minimum interval for friend link availability checks, in minutes.
hints.travellings_header_enabled: Controls whether the Travelling entry appears in the desktop header and mobile navigation drawer.
hints.travellings_footer_enabled: Controls whether the Travelling entry appears in the global footer navigation.
hints.travellings_sidebar_enabled: Controls whether the Travelling entry appears in the post detail sidebar.
hints.local_storage_min_free_space: Uploads will be rejected when local disk free space drops below this threshold. Value is in bytes.
hints.memos_access_token: Generate in Memos Settings -> Account -> Access Tokens

ai_editor.basic_quota_description: Manage the most common global and role-based quota rules here for day-to-day operations.
ai_editor.basic_quota_empty: No basic policy yet. Start with a global daily quota rule.
ai_editor.basic_policy_help: Any limit left empty will be treated as unlimited.
ai_editor.advanced_json_description: Edit this only for special rules such as user, trust_level, or type:* scopes. The content must be a policy array.
ai_editor.alerts_description: The first release supports quota usage, cost usage, and failure burst alerts to close the minimum viable governance loop.
ai_editor.failure_burst_description: Trigger when failures spike within a short window to spot provider, model, or pipeline issues.
ai_editor.cost_mapping_description: Map quota units to the unified admin-facing currency while still converting provider-native pricing when available.
ai_editor.cost_mapping_hint: Displayed cost defaults to quota units × unit price. If the converted provider price is higher, the higher value is used to avoid underestimation.
ai_editor.invalid_quota_json: The current quota policy JSON cannot be parsed. Switched to raw editing mode so you can repair it first.
ai_editor.invalid_advanced_json: Advanced JSON must be a valid policy array before saving.
ai_editor.invalid_alert_json: The current alert threshold JSON cannot be parsed. Switched to raw editing mode so you can repair it first.
ai_editor.invalid_cost_json: The current cost mapping JSON cannot be parsed. Switched to raw editing mode so you can repair it first.

agreements.title: 약관 관리
agreements.description: 이용 약관과 개인정보 처리방침을 여러 버전과 여러 언어로 관리합니다.
agreements.delete_confirm: 이 약관 버전을 삭제하시겠습니까? 삭제 후에는 복구할 수 없습니다.

snippets.title: 영감 보관함
snippets.quick_capture_placeholder: 여기에 영감 조각을 입력하세요. 여러 줄 입력을 지원합니다...
snippets.empty: 아직 저장된 영감이 없습니다. 생각의 조각을 기록해 보세요!
snippets.empty_hint: 작은 메모도 훌륭한 작품의 시작이 될 수 있습니다
snippets.aggregate_hint: 여러 영감을 선택해 AI로 글 개요를 구성합니다
snippets.aggregate_hint_detailed: AI가 선택한 {count}개의 영감 조각을 분석해 서로의 연결점을 찾고, 깊이 있는 글의 개요를 구성합니다.
snippets.topic_placeholder: 작성하고 싶은 글의 주제를 입력하세요 (예: AI로 글쓰기 효율 높이기)
snippets.expand_title: 이 섹션에 더 많은 세부 내용을 추가
snippets.attachments_desc: 이미지를 업로드해 영감을 보완할 수 있습니다
snippets.capture_placeholder_with_info: 영감을 기록해 보세요... (외부 프로그램에서 전달된 정보: {info})
snippets.bookmarklet_desc: 아래 버튼을 북마크 바로 끌어 놓으면 어떤 웹페이지를 보다가도 즉시 영감을 기록할 수 있습니다.
